title: centaurea jacea subsp. decipiens
intro: Centaurea jacea subsp. decipiens, also known as rough knapweed or rough centaury, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, inflammation, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea jacea subsp. decipiens include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or applied topically to the skin.
